metadata.title: Map Poster Guides and Terraink Alternatives | Vellum & Line
metadata.description: A guide hub for Terraink alternatives, TerraInk searches, custom map poster workflows, city map posters, route posters, and printable map art.
metadata.keywords: map poster guides, Terraink alternative, TerraInk alternative, Terraink app, Terraink map poster maker, map poster maker, city map poster maker, route poster maker, custom map poster

page.title: Map Poster Guides
page.description: Guides for people comparing Terraink, TerraInk, and browser-based map poster workflows.

hero.title: Map poster guides for Terraink searches, cities, and routes
hero.description: Use this guide hub to choose the right path: compare Terraink and TerraInk alternatives, make a custom city map poster, turn a route into wall art, or start directly in the Vellum & Line browser studio.

image.alt: Vellum & Line map poster guide hub

guide_index.label: Guide index
guide_index.title: Choose the page that matches your search intent
guide_index.description: Each guide below points to a real indexed page. Start with the Terraink/TerraInk cluster if you are comparing tools, or use the workflow cluster if you already know the poster you want to make.

groups.title: Terraink and TerraInk searches
groups.description: Use these pages when the query includes Terraink, TerraInk, app, review, alternative, comparison, or map poster maker intent.

items.title: Terraink Alternative
items.description: The primary guide for people searching Terraink, TerraInk, or a Terraink alternative and deciding whether a browser map poster workflow fits.

items.title: Terraink Map Poster Maker
items.description: For users who connect Terraink with custom map posters and want a direct path from place search to printable map art.

items.title: Terraink App Alternative
items.description: For app-intent searches where the user wants to open a map poster tool quickly without hunting for an installer.

items.title: Terraink Review Checklist
items.description: A review-oriented page for judging output quality, workflow speed, styling controls, route support, and export usefulness.

items.title: Terraink vs Vellum & Line
items.description: A comparison page for searchers who want to test both workflows against the same city, route, venue, or coordinate.

groups.title: Map poster workflows
groups.description: Use these pages when the user is no longer comparing brands and wants to make a specific kind of printable map poster.

items.title: Map Poster Maker
items.description: The main Vellum & Line workflow for turning a city, address, route, venue, or coordinate into printable map art.

items.title: City Map Poster Maker
items.description: For hometown prints, travel cities, neighborhoods, campuses, landmarks, and wall-ready city map art.

items.title: Route Poster Maker
items.description: For runs, rides, hikes, road trips, travel paths, and other route-based memory posters.

items.title: Wedding Map Poster
items.description: For wedding venues, proposal spots, anniversaries, where-we-met maps, coordinates, and personal map gifts.

cta.label: Make the poster
cta.title: Use one real place as your test
cta.description: Pick a city, route, venue, or coordinate and judge the workflow by the poster file you can create.
